headline: Consumer Tech News (May 4- 8): Big Tech Gain On AI Momentum, Pentagon Awards $500M AI Contract & More
summary: AI demand surges across chips and cloud as AMD beats estimates, Nvidia expands ecosystem deals, and OpenAI partners scale rapidly across infrastructure and enterprise.
